chapter_title.en: The Reward for Those Who Go to the Ziyārah of Ĥusain (a.s.) Yearning for Him

text: 4 وَ عَنْهُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ الْخَزَّازِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (ع) مَا لِمَنْ أَتَى قَبْرَ الْحُسَيْنِ (ع) قَالَ مَنْ أَتَاهُ شَوْقاً إِلَيْهِ كَانَ مِنْ عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الْمُكْرَمِينَ وَ كَانَ تَحْتَ لِوَاءِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ حَتَّى يُدْخِلَهُمَا اللَّهُ الْجَنَّةَ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 4. Ḥasan ibn ‘Abdillāh narrated to me from his father, from Ḥasan ibn Maḥbūb, from Abī Ayyūb Ibrāhīm ibn ‘Uthmān Al-Khazzāz, from Muḥammad ibn Muslim, who said: I asked Abā ‘Abdillāh (Imam Sādiq (a.s.)), “What is the reward for those who go to (the Ziyārah of) the grave of Ḥusain (a.s.)?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Those who go to his Ziyārah yearning for him will be among Allāh’s (most) honourable slaves. (On the Day of Judgment) they will be under the flag of Ḥusain ibn ‘Ali (a.s.) until Allāh takes them to Paradise with Ḥusain (a.s.).”
